description: Fleet-wide Claude Code usage: cost, tokens (with/without cache), sessions, productivity, reliability events (Loki) and latency (Tempo). Filter by mode, user, model, effort, query source, team, env, and session.

panels.title: Cost by mode
panels.description: interactive / automated / workflow — set via run.mode in OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.

panels.title: Cost by query source
panels.description: main / subagent / auxiliary

panels.title: Cost over time (by model)
panels.description: Per-interval spend (trend). Authoritative totals are in the headline / pies / tables.

panels.title: Cost by effort
panels.description: Effort level applied to the request (low/medium/high/xhigh/max).

panels.title: Cost & tokens by user

targets.expr: topk(15, sum by ("user.email") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])))

sum by ("user.email") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])) and on ("user.email") topk(15, sum by ("user.email") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])))

panels.description: Spend and token volume per user.

panels.title: Cost & tokens by team
panels.description: Populated once clients set team.id in OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.

panels.title: Top sessions by cost

targets.expr: topk(25, sum by ("session.id", "run.mode", "user.email") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team"}[$__range])))

sum by ("session.id", "run.mode", "user.email") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team"}[$__range])) and on ("session.id") topk(25, sum by ("session.id") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team"}[$__range])))

panels.description: The 25 most expensive sessions, with their token totals.

panels.title: Token usage by type (stacked)
panels.description: Per-interval token volume (trend). Authoritative totals are in the headline / pies / tables.

panels.title: Cache hit ratio

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / (sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type=~"cacheRead|cacheCreation|input"}[$__range])) > 0)

panels.description: cacheRead / (cacheRead + cacheCreation + input). Higher = more context reuse.

panels.title: Input tokens: cached vs fresh

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) or vector(0)

sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type=~"input|cacheCreation"}[$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.description: Input-side split (output excluded): cacheRead vs input+cacheCreation.

panels.title: Cost per 1M tokens

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])) / (sum(max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])) / 1e6 > 0)

panels.description: Blended efficiency: total cost ÷ total tokens. Heavier cache reuse drives this down.

panels.title: Tokens by model & type

targets.expr: sum by (model) (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="input"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="output"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="cacheRead"}[$__range]))

sum by (model) (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.token.usage_tokens_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range]))

panels.description: Per-model token split by type (input / output / cacheRead / cacheCreation) plus total — the same breakdown `claude usage` prints per model.

panels.title: Tokens used in last 5h
panels.description: Rolling 5h token usage. Set the 5h token limit variable to match your plan.

panels.title: Tokens used in last 7d
panels.description: Rolling 7d token usage. Set the weekly token limit variable to match your plan.

panels.title: Active time per session (avg)
panels.description: Per distinct in-window session (not cumulative session starts).

panels.title: Active time by type
panels.description: user = keyboard interaction, cli = tool/AI processing.

panels.title: Sessions by start type
panels.description: fresh / resume / continue / agents_view (UI launch).

panels.title: Cost by skill

targets.expr: topk(12, sum by ("skill.name") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])))

panels.description: Spend attributed to the active skill / slash command.

panels.title: Cost by subagent

targets.expr: topk(12, sum by ("agent.name") (max_over_time({__name__="claude_code.cost.usage_USD_total", "user.email"=~"$user", model=~"$model", effort=~"$effort", query_source=~"$query_source", "run.mode"=~"$mode", "run.env"=~"$env", "team.id"=~"$team", "session.id"=~"$session"}[$__range])))

panels.description: Spend attributed to named subagent types (Explore, Plan, custom, …).

panels.title: LLM request latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: Computed by Tempo's metrics-generator from claude_code.llm_request spans.

list.name: mode
list.label: Mode
list.description: interactive/automated/workflow. Requires run.mode in OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES on every client — including interactive machines (run.mode=interactive). Until set, data is untagged and 'interactive' selects nothing.

list.name: session
list.label: Session
list.description: High-cardinality drilldown. 'All' uses .+ (cheap) rather than enumerating every id.

list.name: tokens_limit_5h
list.label: 5h token limit
list.description: Set to your plan's 5h token cap so the gauge thresholds mean something.

title: Claude Code · Overview
